problem id: 2c6cb766
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(5) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(6)

examples:
  00111000 -> 00000000
  11011101 -> 00100001
  11001000 -> 00000000
  10101101 -> 00100001
  10100101 -> 00100001
  01101110 -> 10000000
  11000010 -> 00000000
  00010111 -> 11000000
  00111100 -> 00000000
  00101100 -> 00000000

query: 00110111
predicted answer: 11000000
